evals.prompt: Analyze this feature request and generate a technical design plan: Add an advanced search filter to the message list so users can filter by date range, sender name, and message status.
evals.expected_output: Structured feature analysis report written to sk-specs/ containing Feature Summary, Requirements Analysis, Implementation Phases, Reusable Modules, Technical Risks, Execution Order, and Validation Strategy.
expectations: The analysis includes a 'Feature Summary' section.
The analysis includes a 'Requirements Analysis' section.
The analysis includes an 'Implementation Phases' section.
The analysis includes a 'Reusable Modules' section.
The analysis includes a 'Technical Risks' section.
The analysis includes a 'Validation Strategy' section.
The output specifies saving the analysis to sk-specs/<normalized-feature-name>/01-feature-analysis.md.
